prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-PWCCS-13PC-STD-BLCK Product Type: CHISEL Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 12pc Professional Wood Carving Chisel Set Various Blades Woodworking Clay and Wax Description: Whether you've just started dabbling in wood hobby projects or are already an expert, our Universal Tool Wood Carving Chisel Set is a must-have set of essentials for your workshop or crafting area.

This professional quality set comes with 12 chisels, each featuring assorted tip shapes and sizes ideal for carving figures, details and designs into a variety of wood projects. Some of our favorite projects to create with these chisels are whittling whistles, crafting kitchen spoons, making letter openers and making ornaments.

Each chisel has an overall length of 7.75" and comes with a tip protector sleeve. The chisels themselves are constructed of high-quality carbon steel and have wooden handles that will help prevent slippage during use. All of the chisels fit neatly inside of a PVC pouch that we've included so you can keep your tools organized when not in use. Make sure to grab a set of these for yourself whether you're a beginner or a seasoned wood crafter, or gift them to a friend who's a crafting enthusiast. Search Terms: wood working carving tools chiseling hobby Features: - Gold and Silver Marking Stamps: 10K Gold, 18K Gold, 22K Gold, 958 Silver - Color: Black - Length: 3 5/8" - Material: Hardened Stainless Steel === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 12-pc Wood Carving Chisel Set Black
